name: Sunny Biscuit
description: Meet Sunny Biscuit, a brave golden pup with a heart full of adventure. 9 posable joints let her sit, stand, and wave. Scan her identity code to unlock her unique AI-generated life story and personality.
story_preview: Brave, loyal, and always ready for an adventure...
skill: Expert whistle imitator (learned from a bluebird)

name: Coco Cloud
description: Coco Cloud is the softest cuddle companion you'll ever meet. Fluffy cream curls and a gentle personality — the perfect comfort plush. 9 posable joints and changeable outfits.
story_preview: The softest cloud in the sky decided to become a plush dog...

name: Lucky Mochi
description: Lucky Mochi is a chocolate-brown sweetheart with floppy ears and the gentlest eyes. Quiet, loyal, and always by your side.
story_preview: Found sleeping in a bowl of mochi...

name: Sugar Puff
description: Sugar Puff is our premium princess — pure cream-white fluff with the sweetest face. Our most popular plush dog. Comes with exclusive deluxe kit.
story_preview: Born on a cloud made of cotton candy...
skill: Making everyone fall in love instantly

name: Tofu Blossom
description: Tofu Blossom has the iconic Samoyed smile that melts hearts instantly. Pure white, always grinning, always ready to be your friend.
story_preview: Her smile is so bright, flowers turn toward her...

name: Daisy Mochi
description: Daisy Mochi has the iconic corgi proportions — long body, short legs, ears always perked. White and tan coat. Irresistibly cute.
story_preview: Short legs, long body, infinite charm...

name: Marshmallow Dream
description: Marshmallow Dream is ultra-rare — white-to-pink gradient coat with a tiny unicorn horn. The most magical plush dog in the collection. Limited edition.
story_preview: Only 500 exist. Each one contains real stardust (probably)...

name: Sailor Outfit Set
description: Adorable sailor-style outfit for your Mochidog plush. Includes hat, top, and shorts. Fits all 30cm Mochidog plush dogs. Machine-washable fabric.

name: Cozy Hoodie Set
description: Keep your plush dog cozy in this mini hoodie set. Drawstring hood, front pocket, comes in cream or grey. Fits all 30cm Mochidog plush dogs.

name: Party Dress Set
description: Dress your plush dog for the occasion! Tulle skirt, satin bow, and matching headband. Available in pink or lavender.

name: Explorer Vest Set
description: Rugged explorer vest with multiple pockets, matching bandana, and tiny compass charm. Perfect for adventurous plush dogs.

name: Pajama Set
description: Soft cotton pajama set with star print. Includes top + pants + tiny sleep mask. For cozy plush dog nights.

name: Sunglasses Pack
description: 3 pairs of tiny sunglasses: aviator, round retro, and heart-shaped. Fits all Mochidog plush dogs. Instant cool factor.

name: Hat Collection
description: Bucket hat + beret + baseball cap. Mix and match for daily plush dog style. Fits all Mochidog plush dogs.

name: Tiny Shoes Set
description: 2 pairs of tiny sneakers (white + pink). Slip-on style with elastic band. Fits Mochidog plush dog paws.

name: Collector Bundle — Complete Starter Kit
description: The complete Mochidog experience: 1 plush dog of your choice + 2 outfits + sunglasses + hat + shoes + premium collector box + certificate. Save 20% vs buying separately.

name: Starter Outfit Bundle
description: 3 must-have outfits at a special price. Sailor, Cozy Hoodie, and Party Dress — perfect for starting your plush dog's wardrobe.
